zh.lifeSummary: Warin de L'Isle是Gerard de L'Isle和Alice d'Armenters的兒子，於大約1286年出生在英國英格蘭波克夏金斯頓 李爾。他於1302年與Alice Tyeys在英國越可爾霍爾德內斯結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1322年3月16日在英國越可爾朋特福拉可特享年37歲，埋葬在英國越可爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Warin de L'Isle是Gerard de L'Isle和Alice d'Armenters的儿子，于大约1286年出生在英国英格兰波克夏金斯頓 李爾。他于1302年与Alice Tyeys在英国越可爾霍爾德內斯结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1322年3月16日在英国越可爾朋特福拉可特享年37岁，埋葬在英国越可爾。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: L'Isle
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Northumberland, Durham, and Yorkshire): variant of   Lyle   and a cognate of 2 below.
French: habitational name from L'Isle or Lisle, names of several places in various parts of France, named with Old French isle ‘island’ (from Latin insula). Compare Delisle .

variants.name: Lyle
meanings: Scottish and English (of Norman origin): topographic or habitational name from Anglo-Norman French del isle ‘from the island’ (from Latin de insula), denoting someone who lived on an island or who came from a place in France named Ile, Isle, or L'Isle. The surname may also in some cases be from Lille (Nord). Compare Lisle and Iles .

variants.name: Lile
meanings: English and French: variant of   Lisle  .

nameMeanings.name: Warin
meanings: An old name. The same as Waring or Guerin, who came over with the Conqueror; a name probably connected with that of the Waernas or Wernas. the Varini or Verini, a people of the Elbe

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: Warin de L'Isle was born about 1286, in Kingston Lisle, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom as the son of Gerard de L'Isle and Alice d'Armenters. He married Alice Tyeys in 1302, in Holderness, Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 16 March 1322, in Pontefract, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 37, and was buried in Yorkshire, England.

fr.Vale of White Horse, Oxfordshire, Englan: Vale of White Horse, Oxfordshire, Angleterre
fr.lifeSummary: Warin de L'Isle est né environ 1286, à Kingston Lisle, Berkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fils de Gerard de L'Isle et Alice d'Armenters. Il a épousé Alice Tyeys en 1302, à Holderness, Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 16 mars 1322, à Pontefract, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 37 ans, et a été enterré à Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.Vale of White Horse, Oxfordshire, Englan: Vale of White Horse, Oxfordshire, England
de.lifeSummary: Warin de L'Isle wurde um 1286 in Kingston Lisle, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom, als Sohn von Gerard de L'Isle und Alice d'Armenters geboren. Er hat 1302 in Holderness, Yorkshire, England Alice Tyeys geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 16. März 1322 im Alter von 37 Jahren in Pontefract, Yorkshire, England und wurde in Yorkshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Warin de L'Isle è nato il circa 1286 nel Kingston Lisle, Berkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito come figlio di Gerard de L'Isle e Alice d'Armenters. Lui sposato Alice Tyeys nel 1302, nel Holderness, Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 16 marzo 1322, nel Pontefract, Yorkshire, England, all'età di 37 anni, e fu sepolto a Yorkshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Warin de L'Isleは約1286年にイギリスイギリスバークシュアイアキングストン リスルでGerard de L'IsleとAlice d'Armentersの息子として生まれた。1302年にイギリスヨークシュアイアホールデルネスでAlice Tyeysと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1322年3月16日にイギリスヨークシュアイアポンテフラクトで37歳で死去し，イギリスヨークシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.Vale of White Horse, Oxfordshire, Englan: 영국 스퍼드실르 발 프 휘트 호르스
ko.lifeSummary: Warin de L'Isle(은)는 대략 1286년 영국 잉글랜드 버크실르 킨그스턴 리슬일에서 Gerard de L'Isle(와)과 Alice d'Armenters의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1302년 영국 요르크실르 홀더네스에서 Alice Tyeys(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1322년 3월 16일 영국 요르크실르 폰테프라크트에서 37세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 요르크실르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Warin de L'Isle nasceu aproximadamente 1286, em Kingston Lisle, Berkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom filho de Gerard de L'Isle e Alice d'Armenters. Ele casou-se com Alice Tyeys em 1302, em Holderness, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 16 de março de 1322, em Pontefract, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 37 anos, e foi sepultado em Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.Vale of White Horse, Oxfordshire, Englan: веил оф уит хаурс, оксфордшир, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Warin de L'Isle родился около 1286 г. в местности кингстон лисл, биркшир, Англия, Великобритания. Его родителей звали Gerard de L'Isle и Alice d'Armenters. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice Tyeys в 1302 г. в местности холдирнесс, еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер 16 марта 1322 г. в местности понтефракт, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 37 лет и был похоронен в местности еркшир, Англия.

Se casó con Alice Tyeys en 1302, en Holderness, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 16 de marzo de 1322, en Pontefract, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 37 años, y fue sepultado en Yorkshire, Inglaterra.
